name: remediation
description: Remediation sprint — restores broken GGEs and resolves priority-0 blockers.
sprintGoal: Restore GGE G5 by ensuring the planning pipeline always has at least one pending increment defined in the manifest.

stories.title: ANDON: Restore broken GGE — Planning pipeline always has a pending increment to execute
stories.description: Golden Goose Egg G5 indicator is failing. Indicator type: gate_passing. Restore it immediately. Rationale: The plan ceremony cannot run without a pending increment in manifest.json. When all increments complete, the machine stalls silently — no error, no alert, just nothing to plan. This egg catches that stall state immediately. First triggered when increment 9 completed with no successor increment defined.
acceptanceCriteria: GGE G5 indicator passes in orient
